## Summary
- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] docs
- [ ] ci

## Checklist
- [ ] I ran tests locally (`npm run test` and relevant scoped commands)
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed
- [ ] I avoided hardcoded secrets and validated `.env` usage
- [ ] I followed branch naming conventions (`feature/*`, `fix/*`)

## Evidence
- Screenshots / logs / test output (if applicable)
